reviews.review_title: This game is the go-to vr game
reviews.review_description:
Intro:
As a developer for the game, I feel our graphics on the game is really optimised to your device. The game includes many game modes and a new one coming soon called power fight 


Powers:
When you first play, everybody has on there power menu flight when they first join this is used by selecting it and holding both triggers. You can unlock more powers to use and have fun with in power fight and other game modes.

Age rating:
Although if you are British the game is rated a 16+ and If you are American it’s a 13+ the game has settings to toggle gore and other factors to the age rating. 

Opinion:
If you have read this far you get the final part. This game is fun and hard worked on with a big developer team and on behalf of Treron Development LLC I think you should download the game and dive into the fun game modes and deep lore!
this game is very sigma i am grateful for being co owner
